2363060.name: Universal Conquest
2363060.description:
Universal Conquest is a Grand-Strategy/4X/RTS hybrid taking place in the far future, long after mankind has spread across the universe, and colonized other galaxies along with other alien races. The Human Imperium has collapsed tens of thousands of years ago, overthrown by the combined effort of the rest of the Milky Way Galaxy. Following a golden age, the survivors spread across the universe, forgetting most of their history, their culture, and their origins.

Engage in detailed starship combat with hostile alien races...

Manage huge interstellar empires, trade routes, and carve your empire out of the cosmos.

Taking place in a procedurally generated universe simulation, you command the leadership caste of a burgeoning collective whose original roots have been forgotten throughout the millennia, on a quest to subjugate all life in the universe, or expand peacefully across the distant stars, the choice is yours. Even better, once you have conquered your galaxy, expand across the universe to other galaxies across the vastness of space and continue your struggle for domination!

Use weapons of mass destruction to subjugate the universe for your multigalactic empire.

  • Conquer an entirely procedurally generated, completely random, endlessly expanding universe.

  • Featuring Land, Air, Sea, and Space real time RTS combat, immersive 4X turn-based strategy gameplay, and a dynamic procedurally generated universe, take your civilization and explore the vastness of space not yet seen before in a grand scale.

  • Use antimatter, and nuclear weapons to destroy and conquer the universe for your multigalactic empire.

  • Over 5000 different units with their own stats to command, control, and conquer over the cosmos.

  • Manage entire planets, repress alien revolts, hostile cults and other armed rebellions.

  • Colonize distant worlds, multiple galaxies, galactic voids, and explore the universe to conquer, subjugate, vassalize, and ally with alien civilizations.

  • Spread your religion or secular philosophy through tyranny or otherwise to alien civilizations and worlds - through the sword if necessary!

  • Send your armies and fleets to distant worlds to explore and dominate other life forms.

  • Build mighty cities and infrastructure, fight galactic empires and compete with alien collectives for control of the cosmos.

  • Customize your respective species, civilization, and build and colonize planets across a massive, dynamically generated universe featuring multiple galaxies.

  • Rogue-like features including events and hostile life forms spread across the stars. Find incredibly powerful artifacts to take control of the universe by force!

  • Manage your leadership caste, giving them experiences so they level up or demote (or execute) those subordinates who cannot perform properly.

  • Completely moddable with Steam Workshop support.

  • Explore strange alien worlds and various anomalies, dealing with creatures as diverse as space life, hostile robots, energy beings, hive minds, organic bio-terrors, and other strange forms of life.

  • Based on real astronomical principles complete with real-world (and potentially dangerous) astronomical phenomenon, like Pulsars, Neutron Stars, Black Holes (Supermassive and Planetary), Nebulae, Globular Clusters.

  • Featuring a original soundtrack by Belgium-based artist Burning Mir.

Engage in Land, Air, Sea, and Space combat to fulfill your destiny of conquering the universe!

Stretch your mighty hands across the vast reaches of space and dominate the universe.

The Universe is at your fingertips. Master it.
2363060.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言

We Did It Because It Was Hard
We Learn From Failure Not Success!
May The Odds Ever Be In Your Favor!
